name: Johnny Clegg
description: British and South African musician, anthropologist and anti-apartheid icon
abstract: Jonathan Paul Clegg,   (7 June 1953 – 16 July 2019) was a British-South African musician, singer-songwriter, dancer, anthropologist and anti-apartheid activist. He first performed as part of a duo - Johnny & Sipho - with Sipho Mchunu which released its first single, "Woza Friday" in 1976.

about_quotes.speaker: Darius Brubeck
about_quotes.evidence: Johnny Clegg — do you know who Johnny Clegg was? You know quite a cultural hero and a unique individual on many levels, got together the South African — SAMA — South African Music Association.
about_quotes.doc_title: Darius Brubeck interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 29, 2024
